# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_http_80
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 80
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: api_gateway_http
                codec_type: AUTO
                use_remote_address: true
                generate_request_id: true
                normalize_path: true
                merge_slashes: true
                request_timeout: 30s
                common_http_protocol_options:
                  idle_timeout: 60s
                access_log:
                  - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stream.v3.StdoutAccessLog
                route_config:
                  name: api_gateway_routes
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: api_gateway
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/users"
                          route:
                            cluster: users_service
                            timeout: 15s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: 5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset
                              num_retries: 3
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/orders"
                          route:
                            cluster: orders_service
                            timeout: 15s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: 5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset
                              num_retries: 3
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/payments"
                          route:
                            cluster: payments_service
                            timeout: 20s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: 5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          route:
                            cluster: default_service
                            timeout: 10s
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
    - name: users_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: users_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: users-service
                      port_value: 8080
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 60s
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http1_protocol_options: {}
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 200
            max_pending_requests: 500
            max_requests: 1000
            max_retries: 3
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 300
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive: {}
      upstream_http_protocol_options:
        auto_sni: false
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768

    - name: orders_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      lb_policy: LEAST_REQUEST
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: orders_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: orders-service
                      port_value: 8080
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 60s
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http1_protocol_options: {}
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
          upstream_http_protocol_options:
            auto_sni: false
          connection_pool_per_downstream_connection: false
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 300
            max_pending_requests: 800
            max_requests: 1500
            max_retries: 3
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 300
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768

    - name: payments_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 3s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: payments_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:

      common_http_protocol_options:

          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http1_protocol_options: {}
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
          upstream_http_protocol_options:
            auto_sni: false
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 150
            max_pending_requests: 300
            max_requests: 600
            max_retries: 2
      health_checks:

          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 2
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 300
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768

    - name: default_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: default_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: default-backend
                      port_value: 8080
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 60s
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http1_protocol_options: {}
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 100
            max_pending_requests: 200
            max_requests: 500
            max_retries: 2
      health_checks:

          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2

            path: /health

              - start: 200

admin:

  address:
